← Back to features Get the tool
★ Justaino Score

How the Meta Rating is worked out

Every player gets a 0-100 "Justaino Score" for each position, worked out entirely from their real stats and PlayStyles. Nothing is hidden - here are the exact weights the tool uses, position by position. It's my read of the current FC 26 meta, so it's meant to be tuned each season.

Rating = 95% × (50% × Stat fit + 50% × PlayStyle fit) + 5% × OVR
Stat weighting
50%
PlayStyle weighting
50%
OVR tiebreak
5%
  • Each card is scored against its best-fitting role for a position (Poacher vs Target Forward, Winger vs Inside Forward, and so on), then the top-scoring role wins.
  • Stat fit (0-99) is a weighted average of the six stats, using each position's weights below (plus weak foot & skill moves as light extras). Stats matter most where the weight is biggest - shooting for strikers, defending for centre-backs.
  • PlayStyle fit (0-100) counts the meta PlayStyles a card owns for that role - a PlayStyle+ counts 2.5× a basic, and every meta basic counts - measured against the best loadout the role could want.
  • The two halves blend, then the result is pulled just 5% toward the card's in-game OVR - a light tiebreak only, because a 97 with weak face stats plays nothing like a 97. The tables below are the underlying stat and PlayStyle emphasis per position.
The weights, position by position
STPlayStyle ceiling 43.5 pts
Stat weights how much each stat counts
Pace8
Shooting10
Passing4
Dribbling8
Defending1
Physical6
Meta PlayStyles bonus points (a PlayStyle+ counts 2.5× a basic)
Finesse Shot4
Low Driven Shot4
Rapid3
Quick Step3
Technical3
Trickster2
First Touch2
Power Shot1
Chip Shot1
Acrobatic1
Precision Header1
Incisive Pass1
Dead Ball1

Men Gallant FC · Justaino FC Web App Tool - a personal tool for the EA FC 26 Web App.
Weights generated from the live tool on 2026-07-11. Refreshed each season as the meta shifts.
